productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Black Pural Desman Shoes
description: Style NoteThe Pural Desman from adidas is a sturdy yet good looking shoe that's sure to become a wardrobe essential. You can style it with denims and a leather jacket or corduroy trousers and a beige coat. A versatile shoe is sure to become a love-forever classic (as this is going to be!) so buy this now before stocks run out.Product DetailsBlunt toed black shoe with perforations at the forefoot, mesh inlays and beige coloured 3-Stripe on the sidesPadded tongue and inner has central lace ups and pull loop at the heel collarTPU outsole with an arched midfoot, upraised heel and aggressive lugs all overMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
